sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50898" key="i(rodro/mos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱροδρόμος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἱεροδρ-</foreign> (q.v.).</entryFree>
